result: {"verdict": "approve", "reasons": ["Probe confirms anonymous request gets HTTP 403 via Drupal's access denied, with `view healthstats` defined in hook_permission and enforced through hook_menu access arguments", "Endpoint outputs exactly {\"users\":<int>,\"nodes\":<int>} with (int) casts, counting status=1 users and status=1 nodes (uid 0 anonymous row has status 0, so it is correctly excluded)", "drupal_json_output() is D7's native JSON delivery — it sets Content-Type: application/json and the NULL callback return is the core-blessed pattern (drupal_deliver_html_page deliberately skips the text/html header when the callback returns NULL, same as core's user_autocomplete); no print+exit hack", "php -l passes; hooks have doc comments, D7 array() syntax, proper {table} placeholders and query args"]}
